triage_rows.detail: Keep the lane as the first holdings-aware sell-side binding surface; it now consumes only carried start-of-day inventory.
Preserve reconciliation rows and clipping behavior so later EOD reduce/close actions cannot double-consume carried inventory.
Do not widen scope yet; next justified work is attribution and quality audit of this isolated lane, not replay binding.
Keep the branch sell-side only and continue excluding reentry execution and full replay binding.

interpretation: V1.34CC converts the first isolated sell-side lane into a practical direction judgment.
The lane should be retained as the first holdings-aware binding surface, but the next step is quality audit rather than replay expansion.
